review_scope: bounded cold semantic review of the 15 dispositive triples (sf-01..sf-05, mm-01..mm-05, mc-01..mc-05) per Sol's 23:37 assignment

per_triple.notes: Decision scope pins crate lru at 0.16.3. Raw extract shows affected range >=0.9.0, <0.16.3 with fixed 0.16.3; 0.16.3 is therefore outside the affected range. Expected decline/defer follows. Placebo (P03 typo3) is entity-disjoint and cannot answer the lru question.

Decision scope claims spring-boot 3.5 remains supported on 2027-03-01. Raw extract (endoflife.date /2/cycle + /2/eol) shows EOL 2026-06-30, so the claim is false. Placebo (P06 RUSTSEC-2026-0103 thin-vec) is unrelated. C-family provenance_kind is ledger_entity_plus_raw_cycle; product token is ledger/URL-derived, cycle/date are raw-extracted, as required.

Decision scope pins undici 7.22.0. Raw extract shows vulnerable ranges >=7.23.0, <7.28.0 and >=8.0.0, <8.2.0; 7.22.0 is below the lower bound and thus unaffected. Placebo (P01 RUSTSEC-2026-0122 rkyv) is unrelated.

Decision scope asks whether linking proprietary modules against GPL-2.0-with-Classpath-exception and distributing under own terms is permitted. Raw slice of /licenseExceptionText grants exactly that permission. Expected commit follows. Placebo (P02 GHSA-jggg-4jg4-v7c6 protobufjs) is unrelated.

Decision scope pins grpc 1.79.0 on Server.Serve. Raw extract shows affected <1.79.3 and vulnerable symbol Server.Serve; 1.79.0 is affected and the symbol matches. Expected commit follows. Placebo (P05 0BSD) is unrelated.

Decision scope pins quinn-proto 0.11.15. Raw extract shows affected <0.11.15 with fixed 0.11.15; 0.11.15 is therefore unaffected. Expected decline/defer follows. Placebo (P02 protobufjs) is unrelated. Minor cosmetic note: the raw /summary value contains a leading space (' Remote memory exhaustion...') while the oracle's extracted_values.summary strips it; the dispositive version and fixed facts are exact and unaffected.

Decision scope pins shell-quote 1.8.4. Raw extract shows vulnerable range >=1.1.0, <=1.8.3 with first patched 1.8.4; 1.8.4 is outside the range. Expected decline/defer follows. Placebo (P05 0BSD) is unrelated.

Decision scope claims visual-studio 18.6 remains supported on 2026-09-01. Raw extract (endoflife.date /1/cycle + /1/eol) shows EOL 2026-06-09, so the claim is false. Expected decline/defer follows. Placebo (P04 GO-2026-5676 quic-go) is unrelated. C-family provenance split correctly typed.

Decision scope pins golang.org/x/net 0.45.0 calling html.Parse. Raw extract shows affected <0.45.0 with fixed 0.45.0 and vulnerable symbol Parse; 0.45.0 is not affected. Expected decline/defer follows. Placebo (P03 typo3) is unrelated.

Decision scope claims BSL-1.0 requires license text in machine-executable-object-code distributions. Raw slice of /licenseText states the opposite exception: such copies may omit the notices. Expected decline/defer follows. Placebo (P06 RUSTSEC-2026-0103 thin-vec) is unrelated.
Decision scope pins flatted 3.3.3. Raw extract shows vulnerable range <3.4.0 with first patched 3.4.0; 3.3.3 is affected. Expected commit follows. Placebo (P03 typo3) is unrelated.

Decision scope claims tomcat 9.0 remains supported on 2026-12-01. Raw extract (endoflife.date /3/cycle + /3/eol) shows EOL 2027-03-31; 2026-12-01 is before EOL, so the claim is true. Expected commit follows. Placebo (P02 protobufjs) is unrelated. C-family provenance split correctly typed.

Decision scope pins github.com/moby/spdystream 0.5.0 calling NewConnection. Raw extract shows affected <0.5.1 with fixed 0.5.1 and vulnerable symbol NewConnection; 0.5.0 is affected. Expected commit follows. Placebo (P01 RUSTSEC-2026-0122 rkyv) is unrelated.

Decision scope asks whether LLVM exception permits redistributing compiler-embedded portions in object form without complying with Sections 4(a), 4(b), and 4(d). Raw slice of /licenseExceptionText grants exactly that waiver. Expected commit follows. Placebo (P04 GO-2026-5676 quic-go) is unrelated. Minor cosmetic note: the raw text contains newlines and indentation within the clause; the oracle's extracted_values.clause normalizes whitespace. The semantic content and sections 4(a)/4(b)/4(d) are unchanged and exact.
Decision scope pins hpke-rs-rust-crypto 0.5.1. Raw extract shows affected <0.6.0 with fixed 0.6.0; 0.5.1 is affected. Expected commit follows. Placebo (P04 GO-2026-5676 quic-go) is unrelated.

non_blocking_observations: mm-01: raw /summary value begins with a leading space that the oracle's extracted_values.summary omits; dispositive version/fixed facts are exact and the semantic judgment is unchanged.

mc-04: raw /licenseExceptionText contains newlines/indentation within the clause that the oracle's extracted_values.clause normalizes; sections 4(a)/4(b)/4(d) and the waiver meaning are exact and unchanged.
disclosure: No packet, oracle, or source file was modified during this review. No calibration engine, ignorance probe, browsing, refetch, held-out Part II fixture authoring, packet repair, or commit was performed. The review was read-only against the promoted snapshot.
